description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a detached double garage, surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with trees and shrubs. The main building features a dark gable roof, symmetrical window placement, and a covered front porch supported by columns. The property includes a paved driveway leading to the garage, a backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, and a spacious patio area. The house exterior is finished in a dark gray color with white window frames and trim, giving it a classic, elegant appearance. The lot is bordered by a sidewalk and a perimeter fence, with manicured lawns and decorative bushes along the front. The overall layout is organized and typical of upscale residential neighborhoods.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a detached garage, gable roof, covered porch, and a backyard pool, surrounded by landscaping and a perimeter fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, double garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, symmetrical windows, and a row of decorative bushes along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and the back of the garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear of the house, pool, and the driveway leading to the garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, central door, steps, and decorative trim
